message:
feat(ui): integrate detail modal into spring animation system and harden analytics tests

Wire the detail modal (show_detail_modal) into the modal-open spring
animation system so it drives the same smooth open/close transitions as
export, bulk, and saved-views modals. Previously the detail modal opened
without spring interpolation because it was missing from the any_modal
check in both the Tick handler and should_rebuffer() gate.

Also refine the status bar spinner to only animate for active-operation
messages (Searching, Indexing, Refreshing) instead of all statuses that
happen to coincide with a loading context — this prevents error messages
and informational statuses from showing a misleading spinner.

New tests:
- detail_modal_participates_in_modal_open_spring: verify that opening
  the detail modal drives the spring position above rest, and closing it
  reduces it back toward zero over multiple Tick frames
- analytics_chart_data_failure_clears_loading_and_sets_status: verify
  error propagation in the async chart data path
- analytics_entered_sets_loading_context_when_cache_empty: verify that
  entering analytics with no cache triggers the loading spinner
- analytics_entered_skips_load_when_cache_present: verify no redundant
  reload when cache is already populated

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
